selection_policy.filter: Use the x64 .pdata exception table as a one-time function-range source; do not depend on routine fission_cli --list reruns for this binary.
selection_policy.strategy: Manual curation over .pdata-derived candidates to preserve smaller-heavy, heavy, and giant worst-case timeout watchlist roles.

watchlist.reason: Relatively small .pdata body that still fails to produce either legacy or preview output within the 20s compare budget.
Heavy x64 engine body that is useful for fallback-resilience and timeout-closure tracking.
One of the largest .pdata-derived functions in the binary; worst-case giant-function timeout watchlist target.
